title: Peppery Crumble Crusted Pepper Fritters
description: A savory fritter filled with crunchy pepper and topped with a crumbly Italian crust.
instructions: Chop the pepper into small pieces and set aside.
Mix the peppery crumbs with a pinch of salt and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the chopped pepper and peppery crumbs.
Divide the mixture into 6-8 portions, depending on desired fritter size.
Shape each portion into a ball and then flatten slightly into a disk.
Coat each fritter with the Italian crumble mixture.
Place the fritters on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
